title: Multiple $ucover_clk with the same label should be an error

features.name: labeled cover property statement
features.description: Code should include a cover property statement with an explicit block identifier label

features.name: duplicate block identifiers in cover properties
features.description: Code should include two cover property statements with the same block identifier label to trigger duplicate detection
features.snippet:
cover property (@(posedge clk) cyc==5) covlabel;
cover property (@(posedge clk) cyc==5) covlabel;
